productDisplayName: Hush Puppies Men Chevelle Brown Formal Shoes
description: If you want the ultimate sensation of comfort for your feet, then these shoes from hush puppies are made for you. These shoes with the sporty outsole features patented Bounce® technology.Team these with jeans and tees for a cool look. Upper Leather uppers for durability and comfort Stitch detailing for added style Lace-ups for a snug Fit Rounded toe box for greater comfort Sheepskin lining for a luxurious soft feel Midsole Sheepskin lined cushioned footbed for all day comfort EVA midsole for better shock absorption Outsole Modern sporty outsole features patented Bounce® technology Bounce provides advanced shock absorption and energy return for all-day comfort Wash care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
